creator: ilg@livius.net
text:
while booting the GENERIC 3.2 kernel, although the Adaptec 3950 card is identified as a valid PCI device, attached disks are not recognized.

after replacing the card with a 2940, exactly the same configuration booted without problems.

as far as I remember (I don't have a 3.1 disk at hand to give it a try), exactly the same configuration worked in 3.1-RELEASE.

the dmesg output for the 3950 boot follows:

Fix: 

immediatelly after disconnecting the SCSI disk from the LVD bus (we are using a Livingston HotSwap frame) the kernel resumes the boot procedure.
How-To-Repeat: simply reboot
